# Reference Sources

These references are bundled directly in this skill:

- `references/validation-patterns.md` — validation checks per item type
- `references/validation-report-template.md` — prose section template

External shared references (load from `_shared/`):

- `_shared/fabric-cli-commands.md` — fab CLI command reference (verification commands)
- `_shared/learnings.md` — known timing and propagation gotchas
